description: Filesystem-first MCP for Obsidian — an LLM-maintained wiki inspired by Karpathy's LLM Wiki.
name: io.github.bezata/kobsidian-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault this server should operate on.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Obsidian Local REST API plugin. Only required for workspace.* / commands.* / live dataview.query* tools.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' if you've trusted the Local REST API's self-signed certificate.
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_API_VERIFY_TLS

environmentVariables.description: Bearer key for the Obsidian Local REST API plugin (only needed for REST-bridged tools).
environmentVariables.name: OBSIDIAN_REST_API_KEY

title: kObsidian
